title: Image Data
documentation:
## Purpose
The base type for raw PNG image bytes without additional semantic context. Covers any PNG-encoded raster image, regardless of its role in a pipeline.

## When to use
Use `media:png` when a node produces or consumes a PNG file and the semantic role (e.g. vision input, rendered page, icon) is not significant for routing. When the image is specifically intended as input to a vision model or image analysis node, prefer [PNG Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:image;png).

## Notes
PNG uses lossless compression and supports alpha transparency. It is a good default for screenshots, diagrams, and UI assets. For photographic content where file size is a concern, consider [JPEG Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:jpeg;image) or [WebP Image](https://capdag.com/browse/media:webp;image).
